content.query:
CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = ''


CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL naiya_cred
WITH
   IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'

-- Create External DataSource Silver
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_silver
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/',
    CREDENTIAL = naiya_cred
)


-- Create External DataSource Gold
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_gold
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/',
    CREDENTIAL = naiya_cred
)

-- Create External FileFormat
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT format_parquet
WITH(
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION ='org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

--Create External Table
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.extsales
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'extsales',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.sales

SELECT * FROM gold.sales
